title: phaseolus vulgaris var. purpureus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. purpureus, also known as purple kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that is native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. purpureus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood sugar control, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or dried extract, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
